_doc: Story 7.7 (FR20) — RU crisis-resource list. PENDING placeholder awaiting the Gate-9c reviewer-of-record's curated, vetted Russian-language list. Per the Epic-7 infra-now decision this file ships honest placeholders that do NOT fabricate specific national hotline numbers (a wrong number is catastrophic for a distressed user) — it points to real internationally-recognized crisis-line directories the user can navigate to their own country/language, plus an explicit pending-vetting entry. NOT clinically vetted. The reviewer-of-record replaces these entries with the curated RU list at Gate-9c close; clinicalRegisterReviewed for tail-scenes and the CODEOWNERS handle flip at the same gate.

resources.name: Find A Helpline — international crisis-line directory
resources.description: Free, confidential crisis support lines searchable by country and language, including Russian-speaking regions. Interim resource while the curated Russian list is pending reviewer-of-record vetting (Gate 9c).

resources.name: IASP — international crisis-centre directory
resources.description: The International Association for Suicide Prevention's directory of crisis centres worldwide. Interim resource pending the curated Russian list.

resources.name: Russian-language crisis resources — pending reviewer-of-record vetting (Gate 9c)
resources.description: The curated, reviewer-of-record-vetted Russian-language crisis-resource list is in progress (Gate 9c). Until it lands, please use the international directories above or contact your local emergency number.
